Container.Name: JDownloader
Container.Overview:
JDownloader 2 with a clean, sleek, fully DARK UI out of the box — a complete monochrome IBM Carbon (#161616) dark interface where the download list, link grabber AND settings are all dark (not just the menu bar), with light, readable progress bars, on a smooth, hardware-accelerated KasmVNC web desktop. No tweaking, no add-ons — it just looks great from the first start.
=========================================================================== IMPORTANT — FIRST START, PLEASE WAIT (read this): On the first start (and after every image update) JDownloader installs/updates itself and applies the dark theme. The WebUI stays BLACK for a few minutes. Open the container LOG and wait for this banner BEFORE you open the WebUI: ############################################## JDOWNLOADER IS READY -> open the WebUI now ############################################## Do NOT restart the container while it installs — it self-heals the first-run theme reset and prints the banner only once the UI is up AND fully dark. So when you see it, it's already dark and ready. ===========================================================================
What's pre-configured: • Clean, sleek full Dark Mode by default — monochrome Carbon #161616 (flat icons), in a borderless maximised kiosk window; light, readable progress bars. • Switch to a matching Light theme any time via the Theme variable. • Auto-installs and self-updates JDownloader; its install prompts are auto-confirmed for you — nothing to click. • Persistent config + downloads in /config and /downloads; even hidden columns / layout survive a restart.
Notes: • The WebUI opens via HTTPS (port 3001, self-signed cert — accept the browser warning once). HTTPS enables SEAMLESS CLIPBOARD: copy on your PC and paste straight into JD. Plain HTTP (3000) is also exposed, but browsers block the clipboard over HTTP. • PUID/PGID default to 99/100 (nobody/users on Unraid). • Auth: leave Username and Password EMPTY for no login.
Source on GitHub: https://github.com/junkerderprovinz/jdownloader

Config.Name: WebUI Port (HTTP / KasmVNC)
Config.Description: Plain HTTP WebUI. Browsers block seamless clipboard over HTTP — prefer HTTPS (3001).

Config.Name: WebUI Port (HTTPS / KasmVNC)
Config.Description: HTTPS WebUI (self-signed TLS) — the WebUI button opens this; required for seamless clipboard.

Config.Name: AppData (/config)
Config.Description: Persistent JDownloader install, configs, and session data.

Config.Name: Theme (JD_THEME)
Config.Description: Dark = monochrome Carbon #161616, Light = JD's light theme.

Config.Name: KasmVNC Username
Config.Description: Optional. Username for HTTP-basic-auth. Leave EMPTY with password for no login.

Config.Name: User ID (PUID)
Config.Description: User-ID JDownloader runs as. Default 99 (nobody on Unraid).

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: Permission mask for newly created files.
